acceptance_criteria.AC4_swagger_jsdoc_match_contract: PARTIAL — controller Swagger updated; docs/features/blog.md stale (L1, L2)

low_findings.description: Member comment creation table row still lists distinguishable parentId/imageId failure reasons rather than the uniform normalized messages. Contradicts the oracle normalization applied in blog.service.ts.
low_findings.action: Documenter: update line 38 to describe uniform parentId/imageId failure messages.

low_findings.description: Response shapes section still lists authorUserId, moderatedByUserId, moderatedAt in BlogCommentDetail and notes trimming as a deferred task. Both are now stale.
low_findings.action: Documenter: update response shapes section to split public vs. admin/moderation payload descriptions.

observations.description: moderationListComments and moderateCommentStatus use public BlogCommentDetail type, under-declaring the API moderation response. No security impact in current codebase (no admin UI consumes these). Prospective risk if a moderation UI is built without introducing a richer AdminBlogCommentDetail type.
observations.action: Deferred — document when scoping moderation UI work.

test_sufficiency: Adequate for security properties under review. Oracle-parity and data-minimization tests are well-targeted. Coverage gap: no HTTP-level integration test confirms moderation endpoint responses include the three retained fields in the JSON body.
documentation_sufficiency: Inline JSDoc and controller Swagger are accurate. docs/features/blog.md has two stale sections (L1, L2). No operational guidance gaps that affect safe deployment.
